overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game depicting a medieval great hall resembling the Harry Potter Great Hall, with students in dark robes seated at wooden tables, a massive dragon skeleton suspended from the vaulted ceiling, and sunlight streaming through tall Gothic windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval great hall with dining tables and suspended skeleton

agents.ego_description: standing still observing the great hall interior and the students seated at tables

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting at wooden table facing away from camera
student seated at table near the tall windows

entered.detail: tall arched stained glass windows allowing sunlight to stream into the hall
massive skeletal remains of a dragon suspended from the vaulted ceiling
long wooden tables and benches arranged in rows throughout the hall
stone archway and staircase in the background wall
decorative circular emblem embedded in the stone floor
iron chandeliers hanging from chains above the tables

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand medieval dining hall with Gothic architecture and high vaulted ceilings. Students in dark robes sit at long wooden tables beneath a massive dragon skeleton suspended from above. Sunlight streams through tall arched windows on the left, illuminating the stone interior and casting soft shadows across the floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a grand medieval dining hall that emphasizes the scale and atmosphere of a scholarly sanctuary. It begins by capturing the vastness of the Gothic architecture, where high vaulted ceilings tower over the space. The camera lingers on students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables, while a massive dragon skeleton remains suspended ominously above them. Sunlight streams through tall arched windows on the left, gradually illuminating the stone interior and casting soft shadows across the floor to complete the scene.
